sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59549" key="koxu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοχύζω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κοκκύζει</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0508.tlg001:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stratt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Casaubon</placeName>). (This and the foregoing words may be reduplicated forms from the root of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χέω.</foreign>)</entryFree>
